# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

_searchProducts (Request $request)
{
    $query = DB::table('products as p')
        ->select(
            'p.id',
            'p.name',
            'p.description',
            'p.price',
            'p.image_url',
            'c.name as category_name'
        )
        ->join('categories as c', 'p.category_id', '=', 'c.id');

    $conditions = [];
    $bindings = [];

    // Filter by product name
    if ($request->has('name')) {
        $productName = '%' . $request->input('name') . '%';
        $conditions[] = 'p.name LIKE ?';
        $bindings[] = $productName;
    }

    // Filter by category
    if ($request->has('category')) {
        $category = $request->input('category');
        $conditions[] = 'c.name = ?';
        $bindings[] = $category;
    }

    // Filter by price range (min_price, max_price)
    if ($request->has('min_price')) {
        $minPrice = (float) $request->input('min_price');
        $conditions[] = 'p.price >= ?';
        $bindings[] = $minPrice;
    }

    if ($request->has('max_price')) {
        $maxPrice = (float) $request->input('max_price');
        $conditions[] = 'p.price <= ?';
        $bindings[] = $maxPrice;
    }

    // Construct the WHERE clause if conditions exist
    if (!empty($conditions)) {
        $rawWhereClause = implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        $query->whereRaw($rawWhereClause, $bindings);
    }

    // Add ordering, e.g., by price or name
    if ($request->has('sort_by')) {
        $sortBy = $request->input('sort_by');
        $sortOrder = $request->input('sort_order', 'asc'); // Default to ascending
        if (in_array($sortBy, ['name', 'price'])) {
            $query->orderBy('p.' . $sortBy, $sortOrder);
        }
    } else {
        $query->orderBy('p.name', 'asc'); // Default sort
    }

    // Pagination
    $perPage = $request->input('per_page', 10);
    $products = $query->paginate($perPage);

    return response()->json($products);
}
